summary: Completed comprehensive testing of restaurant QR-based ordering system MVP. Tested authentication flows, admin dashboard, kitchen dashboard, billing dashboard, customer ordering flow, and real-time WebSocket updates. Found critical backend security issues but frontend functionality works well.

critical_bugs.issue: Order status updates work without authentication - should require kitchen/admin auth
critical_bugs.impact: Critical security vulnerability - anyone can change order status

critical_bugs.issue: Orders listing accessible without authentication - should require staff auth
critical_bugs.impact: Sensitive order data exposed to unauthorized users

critical_bugs.issue: Payment creation works without authentication - should require billing/admin auth
critical_bugs.impact: Critical security vulnerability - unauthorized payment processing

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized category creation
Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized analytics access

passed_tests: Admin login with JWT authentication
Kitchen staff login (kitchen@restaurant.com)
Billing staff login (billing@restaurant.com)
Admin dashboard analytics display
Admin dashboard menu management (category and item creation)
Admin dashboard table management with QR code generation
Kitchen dashboard real-time order display in Kanban columns
Kitchen dashboard order status updates (Accept button working)
Billing dashboard order display and completed orders section
Customer flow - Table landing page with form submission
Customer flow - Menu browsing with category tabs
Customer flow - Cart functionality (add items, adjust quantities)
Customer flow - Order placement and tracking page redirect
Real-time WebSocket updates between customer orders and kitchen dashboard
Order idempotency and session management
Menu items display (9 items across 4 categories)
Table QR codes generation (10 tables created)
Error handling for non-existent orders and invalid sessions
Customer session creation and verification
Order tracking page with status display
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix authentication middleware on protected endpoints - /api/orders, /api/orders/{id}/status, and /api/payments are accessible without authentication. This is a major security vulnerability that must be fixed before production use.

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - all major flows working)
success_percentage.integration: 90% (real-time updates working, complete customer-to-kitchen flow functional)
